nasb.text: And Jesus said to him, “Today salvation has come to this house, because he, too, is a son of Abraham.

esv.text: And Jesus said to him, “Today salvation has come to this house, since he also is a son of Abraham.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“今天救恩到了這家，他也是亞伯拉罕的子孫。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“今天救恩临到这家了，因为他也是亚伯拉罕的子孙。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“今天救恩临到了这一家，因为他也是亚伯拉罕的子孙。
